HOME.TITLE: Welcome to The Galactic Tournament
HOME.DESCRIPTION: The most powerful species in the universe gather to compete for galactic supremacy. Register your species, start epic battles, and climb the ranking of victories.
HOME.RULE_REGISTER_DESC: Add each species with a name, a power level and a special ability.
HOME.RULE_BATTLE_DESC: Select two registered species and let the system determine the winner.
HOME.RULE_VICTORY_DESC: The species with the highest power level wins. In case of a tie, the alphabetically first name wins.
HOME.RULE_RANKING_DESC: Each victory is stored and the ranking is ordered by the number of wins.

SPECIES_FORM.DESCRIPTION: Species name must be unique. Power level must be a positive integer.
SPECIES_FORM.NAME_ERROR: Name is required, max 100 characters, only letters, without spaces or special characters.
SPECIES_FORM.NAME_DUPLICATED: A species with this name already exists.
SPECIES_FORM.POWER_ERROR: Power level must be a positive integer with a maximum of 10 digits. Decimals, symbols and spaces are not allowed.
SPECIES_FORM.ABILITY_ERROR: Special ability is required, max 100 characters, only letters and spaces.
SPECIES_FORM.ERROR_INVALID_FORM: Please complete the form correctly before submitting.
SPECIES_FORM.ERROR_DUPLICATED_NAME: A species with this name already exists.
SPECIES_FORM.ERROR_SAVE: An error occurred while saving the species.

SPECIES_LIST.TITLE: Registered Species
SPECIES_LIST.DESCRIPTION: All species currently available for battle.
SPECIES_LIST.EMPTY: No species registered yet. Start by creating your first tournament participant.
SPECIES_LIST.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this species? This action cannot be undone.
SPECIES_LIST.ERROR_DELETE: This species cannot be deleted or an error occurred.
SPECIES_LIST.NO_RESULTS: No species match the selected filters.

BATTLE.TITLE: Start Battle
BATTLE.DESCRIPTION: Select two species. The winner is calculated by the backend using the tournament rules.
BATTLE.HELPER_MIN_SPECIES: Register at least two species before starting a battle.
BATTLE.ERROR_SAME_SPECIES: A species cannot battle against itself.
BATTLE.ERROR_STARTING: Error starting battle. Please make sure at least two species are registered.
BATTLE.REASON_HIGHER_POWER: Won by having the higher power level.
BATTLE.REASON_ALPHABETICAL: Won by alphabetical order in case of a tie.

RANKING.TITLE: Galactic Ranking
RANKING.DESCRIPTION: Species ordered by number of victories.
RANKING.EMPTY: No ranking available yet. Start some battles first.
RANKING.CONFIRM_RESET: This will remove all battle results and reset victories to 0. Continue?

API_ERRORS.SPECIES_DELETE_WITH_HISTORY: This species cannot be deleted because it already has battle history.
